items.name: Golden Crispy Chicken
items.description: Ultra-crispy, juicy chicken with a bold KOYA seasoning — the kind of crunch that makes people pause mid-conversation.

items.name: Loaded KOYA Fries
items.description: Hot, golden fries stacked with creamy sauce and spicy kick — rich, messy, and dangerously addictive.

items.name: KOYA Premium Burger
items.description: A thick, juicy premium bite with a glossy finish — balanced, bold, and made to look expensive on camera.

items.name: Crispy Fries
items.description: Golden, salty, perfectly crisp — clean crunch, soft center, and the side that disappears first every time.

items.name: Cold Soft Drink
items.description: Ice-cold, fizzy refreshment — the perfect reset between bites.
